concepts.headline: Fuel your creative flow.
concepts.subline: Single-origin espresso and local art on 24th.
concepts.rationale: Appeals to Mission creatives and commuters with a high-contrast, art-focused local morning hook.

concepts.headline: Café local, alma del barrio.
concepts.subline: Pinturas en la pared y espresso en tu taza.
concepts.rationale: Connects deeply with the Latino arts community using culturally resonant, warm, and inviting imagery.
